title: Start The Operator Station After The System Has Been Turned Off
summary: Bring the operator station from an off state to a ready state by verifying power conditions, clearing any flashing ESTOP fault condition, homing the tipper axes, starting the cycle, and placing the tipper in AUTO mode.
when_to_use: Use when the system has been turned off and the operator station must be started and returned to a ready state.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as the source for AGV startup instructions; the source directs the user to the referenced P40A (V2.0) user manual for AGV startup steps.
Do not use this runbook for fault recovery beyond pulling out a flashing ESTOP and pressing RESET; the source does not provide additional recovery steps if faults do not clear.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the documented startup checks and HMI actions to return the operator station to ready and AUTO mode.

safety_notes: If the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.
Do not invent additional recovery actions if faults do not clear after RESET; escalate per site practice or SME review because the source does not provide further steps.
access_or_tools_needed: Referenced P40A (V2.0) user manual for AGV startup instructions

access_required: Access to the operator station control panel
Access to verify the main disconnect position
Access to verify AGV power status
system_preconditions: The system has been turned off.
external_references: P40A (V2.0) user manual for AGV startup instructions

steps.title: Verify AGVs are powered on
steps.purpose: Confirm the AGV portion of startup is complete before starting the operator station.
steps.instruction: Verify the AGVs are powered on. Use the referenced P40A (V2.0) user manual for AGV startup instructions because this source does not provide those AGV startup steps.
steps.failure_condition: AGVs are not powered on or AGV startup status cannot be confirmed from available information.

actions.label: Check AGV power status
actions.exact_action: Verify the AGVs are powered on.

actions.label: Use referenced AGV manual if startup is needed
actions.exact_action: Use the referenced P40A (V2.0) user manual for AGV startup instructions; this source does not provide those AGV startup steps.

stop_or_escalate_if: AGV startup instructions are needed beyond verification, because this source does not include them.

source_evidence.text: Verify the AGVs are powered on. Use the referenced P40A (V2.0) user manual for AGV startup instructions; this source does not provide those AGV startup steps.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system has been turned off, startup includes verifying AGVs are powered on...

steps.title: Verify the main disconnect is ON
steps.purpose: Confirm main power is available to the operator station startup sequence.
steps.instruction: Verify the main disconnect is ON.
steps.expected_result: The main disconnect is confirmed ON.
steps.healthy_condition: Main disconnect is in the ON position.

actions.label: Check main disconnect
actions.exact_action: Verify the main disconnect is ON.

stop_or_escalate_if: The main disconnect is not ON.

source_evidence.text: Verify the main disconnect is ON.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system has been turned off, startup includes ... verifying the main disconnect is ON...

steps.title: Check whether the ESTOP is flashing
steps.purpose: Determine whether a fault-clear action is required before continuing startup.
steps.instruction: At the operator station control panel, check whether the ESTOP is flashing.
steps.expected_result: The ESTOP condition is identified as flashing or not flashing.
steps.healthy_condition: ESTOP is not flashing, or a flashing condition is identified for reset.
steps.failure_condition: ESTOP is flashing and requires reset before startup can continue.

actions.label: Inspect ESTOP status
actions.exact_action: At the operator station control panel, check whether the ESTOP is flashing.

Operator station control panel layout for locating relevant controls and status areas.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ESTOP is flashing and faults must be cleared before continuing.

source_evidence.text: At the operator station control panel, check whether the ESTOP is flashing. [Image support needed: System screen artifact from the stopping and startup procedures for the OptiSweep system and operator station.]

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: At the operator station control panel, if the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.

steps.title: Clear a flashing ESTOP fault
steps.purpose: Clear any faults associated with a flashing ESTOP so startup can proceed.
steps.instruction: If the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.
steps.expected_result: Any faults associated with the flashing ESTOP are cleared.
steps.healthy_condition: The ESTOP flashing condition is cleared after pulling out the ESTOP and pressing RESET.
steps.failure_condition: Faults do not clear after pulling out the ESTOP and pressing RESET.

actions.label: Press RESET
actions.exact_action: Press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.

stop_or_escalate_if: Faults do not clear after pressing RESET.
Additional recovery is needed beyond RESET, because the source does not provide further steps.

source_evidence.text: If the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults. [Image support needed: System screen artifact from the stopping and startup procedures for the OptiSweep system and operator station.]

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: At the operator station control panel, if the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.

steps.title: Identify all axes to be homed
steps.purpose: Ensure all documented tipper axes are included in the homing sequence.
steps.instruction: Home every documented axis: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.
steps.expected_result: The operator identifies the full set of axes that must be homed.
steps.healthy_condition: All four axes are included: Z1, A1, Z2, and A2.
steps.failure_condition: One or more required axes are omitted or incorrectly identified.

actions.label: Confirm axis set
actions.exact_action: Home every documented axis: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Axis naming context for Z1, Z2, A1, and A2.
Primary operator screen used to control tipper movement and referencing.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required axes cannot be identified on the available HMI or controls.

source_evidence.text: Home every documented axis: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Home every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper).

steps.title: Start automatic axis referencing
steps.purpose: Initiate homing of the documented tipper axes.
steps.instruction: Press AUTO REF to home the axes.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO REF is accepted and the axes begin moving through the homing sequence.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO REF does not start homing.

actions.label: Press AUTO REF
actions.exact_action: Press AUTO REF to home the axes.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Startup system screen context that includes AUTO REF.
Related HMI context mentioning AUTO REF.
Control panel reference for homing/reference controls.

stop_or_escalate_if: AUTO REF does not initiate homing.

source_evidence.text: Press AUTO REF to home the axes.

steps.title: Observe axis homing movement to completion
steps.purpose: Verify that homing is actively occurring and completes at the home position.
steps.instruction: Observe the axis button change from green to yellow to indicate it is moving, and allow the tipper motor to move until it senses the home proximity switch and stops.
steps.expected_result: The axis button changes from green to yellow during movement, and the tipper motor stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
steps.healthy_condition: Axis button color changes from green to yellow while moving, and motion stops at the home proximity switch.
steps.failure_condition: Axis button does not indicate movement as expected, or the tipper motor does not stop at the home proximity switch.

actions.label: Observe axis status color
actions.exact_action: Observe the axis button change from green to yellow to indicate it is moving.

actions.label: Observe homing stop condition
actions.exact_action: Allow the tipper motor to move until it senses the home proximity switch and stops.

Related HMI context for referencing and axis movement.

stop_or_escalate_if: The axis button does not change from green to yellow during homing.
The tipper motor does not stop after sensing the home proximity switch.

source_evidence.text: Observe the axis button change from green to yellow to indicate it is moving, and allow the tipper motor to move until it senses the home proximity switch and stops. On the operator station HMI, an axis button changing from green to yellow indicates the axis is moving during AUTO REF homing.

steps.title: Start the cycle
steps.purpose: Command the operator station to move from homed state into the ready sequence.
steps.expected_result: The cycle start command is issued.
steps.healthy_condition: CYCLE START is accepted by the operator station.
steps.failure_condition: CYCLE START is not accepted or does not initiate the next motion.

steps.instruction: Verify the motor moves from home to ready.
steps.expected_result: The motor moves from home to ready.
steps.healthy_condition: The motor reaches the ready state after CYCLE START.
steps.failure_condition: The motor does not move from home to ready.

actions.label: Observe move to ready
actions.exact_action: Verify the motor moves from home to ready.

steps.expected_result: The tipper is placed in AUTO mode.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO mode is active on the tipper.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper is not in AUTO mode.

actions.exact_action: Place the tipper in AUTO mode.

steps.title: Verify the tipper is waiting for WCS instructions
steps.purpose: Confirm the operator station has reached the expected ready operating state.
steps.instruction: Verify the tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.
steps.expected_result: The tipper is in AUTO mode and waiting for WCS instructions.
steps.healthy_condition: The tipper remains ready and waiting for WCS instructions.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper does not wait for WCS instructions after being placed in AUTO mode.

actions.label: Confirm waiting state
actions.exact_action: Verify the tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.

source_evidence.text: Verify the tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The tipper will wait for the WCS to send instructions.

success_criteria: Any flashing ESTOP condition is cleared using pull-out and RESET.
Axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 are homed using AUTO REF.
Axis movement is observed by button color change from green to yellow and stops at the home proximity switch.
CYCLE START is pressed and the motor moves from home to ready.
The tipper is placed in AUTO mode.
The tipper waits for WCS instructions.
healthy_conditions: ESTOP is not flashing, or flashing condition clears after pull-out and RESET.
Axis button changes from green to yellow during homing.
Tipper motor stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
Motor moves from home to ready after CYCLE START.
Tipper is in AUTO mode and waiting for WCS instructions.
failure_conditions: Flashing ESTOP faults do not clear after RESET.
AUTO REF does not start homing.
Axis button does not change from green to yellow during homing.
Tipper motor does not stop at the home proximity switch.
Motor does not move from home to ready after CYCLE START.
Tipper does not enter AUTO mode or does not wait for WCS instructions.
escalation_guidance: If AGV startup is required, use the referenced P40A (V2.0) user manual because this source does not provide AGV startup steps.
If faults do not clear after pulling out the ESTOP and pressing RESET, stop and escalate because the source does not provide further recovery actions.
If homing or move-to-ready behavior does not occur as described, stop and escalate for SME review because the source does not provide additional troubleshooting in this startup procedure.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: If the system has been turned off, startup includes verifying AGVs are powered on, verifying the main disconnect is ON, clearing flashing ESTOP faults, homing axes, pressing CYCLE START, and placing the tipper in AUTO mode.

missing_details: The source does not provide AGV startup sub-steps; it only states that AGVs must be powered on and references the P40A (V2.0) user manual.
The source does not provide additional troubleshooting or recovery steps if RESET does not clear a flashing ESTOP fault.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not explicitly state whether production stop or LOTO is required for this startup procedure.
